prestazioni: Upgrade to a bespoke twin-turbo system utilizing Garrett GT35R turbos (84mm compressor wheels) paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust featuring dual 3.5-inch outlets and a Valvetronic-controlled bypass valve system, specifically calibrated for the 6.75L L410 V8 engine (engine code: L410HT) to achieve 650+ WHP while maintaining OEM drivability and emissions compliance via a Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel mapping and closed-loop lambda control

Installation of a custom-forged internals package by Cosworth, including Mahle Motorsport 9.5:1 compression pistons, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft with 90mm stroke, paired with a dry-sump oiling system by Dailey Engineering and a custom baffled oil pan to handle sustained 7,500 RPM operation under lateral loads exceeding 1.2G

Chassis reinforcement via a full T45 steel roll cage by Safety Devices, integrated with a custom KW Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilover suspension featuring linear-rate springs (800 lb/in front, 900 lb/in rear) and spherical bearing top mounts, paired with AP Racing 6-piston front (400mm) and 4-piston rear (380mm) brake calipers with two-piece floating rotors and Ferodo DS3000 pads for track use
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion kit by Vorsteiner, including extended front fenders (30mm per side), rear quarter panels (40mm per side), and a custom 3-piece rear diffuser with integrated dual exhaust cutouts, finished in a satin clear coat with exposed weave

Custom 22-inch forged aluminum wheels by BBS (FI-R model) in a staggered fitment (9.5x22 ET25 front, 11.5x22 ET35 rear) with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30 front, 305/25 rear) and paired with a custom air suspension system by Air Lift Performance with 3H management for adjustable ride height and camber

Full interior reupholstery by Bridge of Weir Leather in a bespoke two-tone scheme (Dark Russet and Beluga) with diamond-stitched door cards, Alcantara headliner, and a custom digital gauge cluster by AIM MXS Strada featuring OLED displays for boost, oil pressure, and AFR, integrated with a RaceLogic VBOX for lap timing and telemetry
